key_items: US CLARITY Act brings 'major spike of euphoria' to Bitcoin amid renewed legislative momentum
Trump Family Trust and institutional players (Mubadala, Gemini) executing significant Bitcoin-related purchases
Most pro-Bitcoin Federal Reserve Board to date could boost crypto industry
reasoning: Multiple institutional tailwinds and pro-crypto regulatory progress (CLARITY Act advancement, pro-Bitcoin Fed leadership) are creating genuine medium-term bullish conditions, though short-term technical weakness below $82k and rising Treasury yields indicate consolidation before the next leg up. The convergence of corporate treasury accumulation (Trump family, Mubadala, Strategy), improved regulatory clarity, and Fed policy shift outweighs near-term macroeconomic headwinds for a 1-7 day swing trading window.
risks: US Treasury yields surging to new highs and bond market reclaiming control could trigger a rapid reversal below $80k if inflation data disappoints or Fed rate-hike expectations return, particularly given stretched leverage in Bitcoin ETFs.
